articles.title: Daniellarium
articles.contents:
Hello and welcome on my homepage 🙋🏾!
I am currently a PhD student at UQAM in
the Sociology Department. I
study internet studies, game studies, and gender. In particular, I am
interested in female gamers who streams their games on plateforms like
Twitch, and Facebook Gaming. I am actually working of how gender impacts
games and game players.
